/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ehtimam_app.dir/ehtimam_app_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ehtimam_app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ehtimam_app.dir/src/gui/AppController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ehtimam_app.dir/src/gui/LoginWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ehtimam_app.dir/src/gui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ehtimam_app.dir/src/gui/CircleWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ehtimam_app.dir/src/network/NetworkClient.cpp.o -o ehtimam_app -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets -lpthread /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
